name: agy-tiered-intel
description: A 5-tier agent architecture for Antigravity CLI with automated model routing and context shielding.
author: Gemini CLI

settings.name: stream_internal_dialogue
settings.description: Stream the internal reasoning and tool calls of subagents to the terminal.

settings.name: collapse_tool_outputs
settings.description: Visually collapse raw tool-use executions (e.g. grep, read_file) and stream only synthesis text to prevent terminal noise.
